g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should I structure my React components for a notes + chat app?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a chat UI component in React?')
sendPrompt('Should I use React Query or SWR for fetching data from Elysia?')
sendPrompt('How do I create CRUD routes for notes in Elysia.js?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a chat endpoint in Elysia that calls the Anthropic API?')
sendPrompt('How does Elysia enforce type safety end to end with the frontend?')
sendPrompt('Should I use Drizzle or Prisma with Elysia.js and PostgreSQL?')
sendPrompt('What does the notes table schema look like in PostgreSQL?')
sendPrompt('How do I inject stored notes into the Anthropic API prompt as RAG context?')
sendPrompt('How does RAG work with my notes stored in PostgreSQL?')
